ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user performing the interaction */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user's session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser and device */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page where the interaction occurred */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object involved in the interaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Specific action type (e.g., MouseEvent, Click) */,
  "inputs" TEXT /* Inputs provided during the interaction */,
  "options" TEXT /* Additional options associated with the action */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the interaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction was logged */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* URL of the page that referred the user to the current page */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in milliseconds */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product if the interaction involves a product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product or page */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product or page */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* X and Y coordinates of the mouse event */,
  "scroll_position" TEXT /* Scroll position on the page */,
  "is_first_time_user" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is visiting the site for the first time */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the marketing campaign */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the traffic (e.g., Google, Facebook) */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Marketing medium (e.g., CPC, CPM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each interaction
